title: More Feeding Trough Variants
description: Slexom's Animal Feeding Troughs for every kind of wood
body: [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Feeding-Trough-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) **Note**: This Mod is based on [Slexom](https://modrinth.com/user/Slexom)'s [Animal Feeding Trough](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal_feeding_trough) and my [More Composter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-composter-variants), both are required for this mod to run. ## More Feeding Trough Variants Fill your builds with more colourful ways of feeding your animals as now each wood type has its own feeding trough. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/e69j1.gif) ### Adding 12 new _Animal Feeding Troughs_ to Minecraft ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ocqi2.gif)**]()
